data.title: Oversold Optimism (OP) shows RSI at 29.28, eyeing $0.115 target by April 2026 if resistance breaks.
data.description: The stock Optimism (OP) is currently trading at a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 29.28, indicating oversold conditions. This presents a potential opportunity for a rebound. Based on technical analysis, if a key resistance level is surpassed, a target price of $0.115 could be achieved within the next 2-4 weeks.

data.title: TCOM Investor Alert: Kessler Topaz Meltzer & Check, LLP Encourages TCOM Investors with Losses to Contact the Firm
data.description: Have you purchased securities of TCOM from April 30, 2024, to January 13, 2026? Investors in Trip.com Group Limited (NASDAQ: TCOM) are impacted by a securities fraud class action lawsuit covering the period from April 30, 2024, to January 13, 2026. Investors have a deadline to seek further action.

data.title: By April 2026, APT forecast predicts $1.03 resistance break. Targets: $0.99-$1.03 (1 week), $0.88-$1.09 (1 month), support at $0.91.
data.description: Summary of APT Price Predictions: In the short term, the price target for APT is estimated to be between $0.99 and $1.03 within one week. Looking at a medium-term forecast over a month, the price range is anticipated to be between $0.88 and $1.09. The bullish breakout level is identified at $1.03 while critical support stands at $0.91. These projections provide insights for those interested in the cryptocurrency market.

data.title: Arbitrum price at $0.091; RSI 37.85 signals oversold. Potential recovery to $0.11 if support holds. Technical analysis indicates.
data.description: The stock of ARB is currently trading at $0.091 with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 37.85, indicating oversold conditions. Analysts believe there is a possibility of a rebound to $0.11, which is the upper Bollinger Band, if the current support level is maintained.

data.title: Zoomex Launches Earning Initiative as Inflation Drives Shift Toward Capital Efficiency in Crypto Markets
data.description: A recent announcement from Zoomex, a crypto exchange based in Victoria, Seychelles, indicates a shift in user behavior towards yield and systematic strategies due to uncertainty about interest rates. The platform has launched a new initiative highlighting its earning products in response to growing demand. This move comes amidst concerns about rising inflation.

data.title: Arcutis Presents New Phase 2 Results in Infants with Atopic Dermatitis in Late-Breaking Session Today at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology Annual Meeting
data.description: Today at the 2026 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) conference, Arcutis presented new Phase 2 results for infants with atopic dermatitis in a late-breaking session. The study revealed promising outcomes for this population, with a significant improvement in symptoms noted. These findings offer hope for infants suffering from this condition.

data.title: Kymera Therapeutics Presents KT-621 BroADen Data in Late-Breaking Research Session at the American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting
data.description: An insightful presentation showcased encouraging results from the BroADen Phase 1b study for atopic dermatitis, underlining the promising oral characteristics of KT-621.

data.title: Press Release: AAD: new results from Sanofi's amlitelimab phase 3 studies in atopic dermatitis presented in late-breaking research session
data.description: New findings from Sanofi's phase 3 trials on amlitelimab for atopic dermatitis were shared in a late-breaking research session. The study revealed significant improvements in patient outcomes, with amlitelimab demonstrating a promising efficacy rate of over 70%. These latest results mark a noteworthy advancement in the treatment of atopic dermatitis.

data.title: NEAR Protocol at $1.18 tests critical $1.16 support level. Possible uptrend to $1.25-$1.31 with March 2026 support.
data.description: The price of NEAR Protocol is currently at $1.18 following a test of a crucial support level. Analysis indicates a possible increase to the range of $1.25-$1.31 if buyers maintain the current levels until March 2026.

data.title: Zoomex to Attend EthCC Cannes, Focusing on Industry Dialogue and Infrastructure Development
data.description: Zoomex, a leading global crypto derivatives exchange, has confirmed its participation in the upcoming Hack Seasons Conference scheduled for April 1 in Cannes, France. The conference is organized by Metaverse Post as a part of the larger Ethereum Community Conference (EthCC) week. This event is set to bring together innovators and enthusiasts within the cryptocurrency space to discuss and explore the latest trends and developments. The attendance of Zoomex at this conference highlights its commitment to engaging with the wider community.

data.title: AAD 2026: Late-Breaking Nemolizumab Data Demonstrate Clinically Meaningful Benefits for Children Aged 2 to 11 With Moderate-to-Severe Atopic Dermatitis
data.description: In ZUG, Switzerland, Galderma (SIX: GALD) unveiled phase II findings indicating that nemolizumab proved to be safe and efficacious in children between the ages of 2 and 11 suffering from moderate-to-severe atopic dermatitis. The results demonstrated a significant and enduring decrease in skin lesions and itch for a period of up to one year. These outcomes are set to be disclosed in a late-breaking segment during the upcoming 2026 American Academy of Dermatology (AAD) Annual Meeting. Atopic dermatitis stands as the prevailing inflammatory skin disorder.

data.title: Anumana Secures FDA Clearance for First-of-Its-Kind ECG-AI Algorithm for Early Detection of Pulmonary Hypertension
data.description: Anumana, a company based in Cambridge, Massachusetts, has recently obtained clearance from the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its pulmonary hypertension (PH) algorithm. This clearance was granted under the FDA's 510(k) program.

data.title: HELE SHAREHOLDER NOTICE: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP Investigates Claims on Behalf of Investors of Helen of Troy
data.description: Securities litigation partner James Wilson from Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who have experienced substantial losses in Helen of Troy investments to reach out to him directly. If you have suffered notable losses in Helen of Troy stock or options and wish to explore your options, Wilson encourages you to contact him.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) hovers at $0.17, RSI at 52.83. Possible $0.18 breakout or retest of $0.16 support ahead.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Stellar (XLM) is currently trading at $0.17 and has maintained a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 52.83. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a breakout towards the $0.18 resistance level or a retest of the $0.16 support level in the upcoming weeks. The market is showing signs of consolidation before a potential move.

data.title: CHAMPION-AF study of the WATCHMAN FLX™ Left Atrial Appendage Closure Device as a first-line therapy for stroke risk reduction meets all primary and secondary safety and efficacy endpoints
data.description: New data reveals that the WATCHMAN FLX device offers better protection from bleeding compared to blood thinners in patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation. The device showed statistically superior efficacy and was presented at ACC.26. These findings were published concurrently in The New Journal, marking a significant advancement in treatment options with important implications for the medical community.

data.title: LTC price aims $58-60 with neutral RSI at 47.17. Bearish MACD signals caution for bulls in $54.57 trade.
data.description: Litecoin is currently priced at $54.57, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 47.17. Technical analysis indicates a possible move towards the $58 resistance level; however, bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals advise caution for Litecoin bulls.

data.title: Cosmos's ATOM at $1.68 may hit $2.00 with RSI signals. Possible bullish move to $2.00+ in April 2026.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ATOM is currently trading at $1.68 with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicating neutral conditions. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of a rebound to the $1.97 resistance level, and if bullish momentum increases in April 2026, the price could reach targets exceeding $2.00.

data.title: HI-PEITHO trial demonstrates Boston Scientific EKOS™ Endovascular System is superior to standard of care for treatment of acute pulmonary embolism
data.description: A recent global randomized trial revealed a significant reduction in clinical event rates for patients with intermediate-risk pulmonary embolism (PE) who were treated with the EKOS device in addition to anticoagulation compared to those receiving anticoagulation alone. These groundbreaking findings were presented at ACC.26 and were simultaneously published. The study highlights the potential benefits of using the EKOS device alongside standard anticoagulation therapy for PE patients, indicating promising results in improving outcomes.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash may hit $500 with RSI at 53 and price around Bollinger Band resistance ($480.60). Analysis hints at $497 or $451 levels.
data.description: The current trading price of BCH stands at $480.60, indicating a positive trend with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) at 53. The price is hovering close to the upper Bollinger Band resistance. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of BCH reaching a resistance level of $497 or experiencing a retracement towards the support level at $451.

data.title: Google to support $5B Anthropic data center in Texas; US judge halts effort to limit AI firm's operations.
data.description: Google and various lenders have joined forces to provide financing for a sizable $5 billion Texas data center project for Anthropic, an artificial intelligence company. This initiative comes as a response to a recent development where a US judge intervened and prevented the federal government from imposing restrictions on Anthropic's operations.
